zh.lifeSummary: Richard Waltham於1485年出生。他和Mabel Bowery至少有1個兒子。他去世於1535年享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Waltham于1485年出生。他和Mabel Bowery至少有1个儿子。他去世于1535年享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Waltham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Waltham (Lincs, Essex, Leics) or any of the numerous other places so named.

variants.name: Whatham
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Waltham  .

variants.name: Wattam
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Waltham  .

variants.name: Whattam
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Waltham  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Waltham was born in 1485. He had at least 1 son with Mabel Bowery. He died in 1535, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Waltham est né en 1485. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mabel Bowery. Il est décédé en 1535, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Waltham wurde 1485 geboren. Er hatte mit Mabel Bowery mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1535 im Alter von 50 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Waltham è nato il nel 1485. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mabel Bowery. Morì nel 1535, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.Axminster, Devon, England: イギリスデボンアクスミンスター
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Walthamは1485年に生まれた。彼はMabel Boweryとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1535年に50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Waltham(은)는 1485년 태어났다. 그는 Mabel Bowery(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1535년 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Waltham nasceu em 1485. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mabel Bowery. Ele faleceu em 1535, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Waltham родился в 1485 г. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mabel Bowery. Он умер в 1535 г. в возрасте 50 лет.
